# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

This is a community Discord theme repository. Everyone who contributes, comments, or interacts here is expected to:

- Be respectful toward other contributors and their work
- Give constructive feedback — critique the theme, not the person
- Credit original authors when referencing or building upon their work
- Keep discussions relevant to Discord theming and design

The following are not acceptable:

- Harassment, insults, or personal attacks
- Submitting another author's theme as your own
- Spam, placeholder content, or low-effort submissions passed off as finished work
- NSFW content submitted without proper labeling (see [Content Policy](https://github.com/Silverfox0338/discord-themes/wiki/Developer-&-Contributor-Guide#content-policy))
- Any attempt to use CSS submissions for malicious purposes

## Enforcement

The repo owner (@Silverfox0338) reserves the right to:

- Remove any content that violates these standards
- Revoke contributor access without notice for repeated or serious violations
- Close issues or PRs that are off-topic or disrespectful

## Reporting

If you see behavior that violates this code of conduct, [open an issue](https://github.com/Silverfox0338/discord-themes/issues/new/choose) or contact @Silverfox0338 directly.
